basic_details.job_title: CMO Kushinagar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 17 Medical Officer / Female Doctor Posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years for all posts.

qualification.details: Female Doctor: MBBS Degree holder and registered in Uttar Pradesh Medical Council. Medical Officer: MBBS Degree holder and registered in Uttar Pradesh Medical Council. Medical Officer EMO: MBBS Degree holder and registered in Uttar Pradesh Medical Council. Medical Officer (with experience): MBBS Degree holder and registered in Uttar Pradesh Medical Council and 01 year experience in similar work.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CMO Kushinagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CMO Kushinagar Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMO Kushinagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the CMO Kushinagar Recruitment 2026 is 20th June 2026. Candidates are advised to send their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by CMO Kushinagar?
faq.answer: Chief Medical Officer Kushinagar has announced a total of 17 vacancies for the posts of Medical Officer and Female Doctor in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Medical Officer and Female Doctor posts is 65 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The basic educational qualification required for all the Medical Officer and Female Doctor posts is an MBBS Degree. Additionally, candidates must be registered with the Uttar Pradesh Medical Council.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any experience required for any of the posts?
faq.answer: Yes, for one of the Medical Officer positions, candidates are required to have at least 01 year of experience in similar work, in addition to the MBBS degree and registration.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer and Female Doctor posts?
faq.answer: The salary for these positions ranges from Rs. 80,000 to Rs. 100,000 per month, with some positions offering additional allowances.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the CMO Kushinagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it carefully, attach necessary documents, and send it via Registered Post or Speed Post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the CMO Kushinagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates who perform well in these stages will be considered for the positions.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Chief Medical Officer Kushinagar. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
